summary: Frontend testing completed for 'Crear/Editar Predio' modal in Actualización module. All 4 features verified: 1) Zona field is now an INPUT (not Select), 2) 'Terrenos existentes en manzana' section appears when manzana != '0000', 3) 30-digit code updates dynamically, 4) Condición dropdown z-index fixed - appears above modal.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Modal 'Crear Nuevo Predio' in Actualización module now matches Conservación module (Predios.js). All features working correctly.

1_zona_es_input.details: Zona (6-7) field is an INPUT element (not a Select/dropdown). Helper text '00=Rural, 01=Urbano, 02-99=Correg.' is displayed below the field.

2_predios_en_manzana.details: When manzana value is different from '0000', a cyan section appears showing 'Terrenos existentes en manzana X'. If no predios exist, shows 'No hay predios registrados en esta manzana'. Uses API '/predios/por-manzana/{municipio}'.

3_codigo_30_digitos_dinamico.details: The 30-digit code display updates dynamically when field values change. Tested by changing Zona from '00' to '01' - code updated from '54720000...' to '54720010...'.

4_dropdown_zindex.details: Condición (22) dropdown appears correctly above the modal (not behind it). SelectContent z-index set to 999999 with side='bottom' default.

crear_predio_modal.title: Crear Nuevo Predio - Sardinata
crear_predio_modal.codigo_homologado_section: Shows 'Código Homologado Asignado' with availability status

codigo_nacional_section.display: 30-digit code with color-coded segments and (30/30) counter
codigo_nacional_section.predios_manzana_section: Cyan background section showing existing terrenos when manzana != '0000'

comparison_with_conservacion.zona_field: IDENTICAL - Both use Input with helper text
comparison_with_conservacion.predios_en_manzana: IDENTICAL - Both show cyan section with existing terrenos
comparison_with_conservacion.dropdown_zindex: IDENTICAL - Both use z-[999999] for SelectContent
